title: aucuba japonica var. japonica
intro: Aucuba japonica var. japonica, also known as the Japanese aucuba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Aucuba japonica var. japonica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
